programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: An industrialist invites some experts to visit his theme park of cloned dinosaurs. After a power failure, the creatures run loose, putting everyone's lives, including his grandchildren's, in danger.

programme.title: Back To The Future III
programme.desc: In Back to the Future Part III, Marty travels to 1885 to save Doc from an outlaw. Packed with laughs, action, and heart, it's the epic Wild West finale to the beloved trilogy.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Paranormal enthusiasts Abby, Erin, Jillian and Patty set out to capture ghosts when they realise that someone is attempting to cause an apocalypse by summoning ghosts in the city of New York.

programme.title: City Of Ember
programme.desc: Ember was built as a refuge for humanity 200 years ago. Now, the great generator that powers the city is failing, and Ember is falling into darkness as the dazzling lights begin to flicker and fade.

programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: E23 - Nona Source/Bateaux-Mouches/T3 Architecture/Fifties Fashion
programme.desc: An ethical alternative project by LVMH, Nona Source is a resale platform for exceptional fabric. All about the origins of the Bateaux-Mouches. The T3 Architecture practice in Marseilles presents architectural design with an artisanal touch. The very feminine fashion style of the 1950s continues to inspire major designers.

programme.title: De Monstre A Citoyen
programme.desc: Can murderers sentenced to life really be rehabilitated? In search of an answer Alain Gravel interviews four in exactly that situation. What led them to commit the irredeemable? How have they changed during their time in prison? The journalist also looks into the Canadian parole system.

programme.title: E30 - The Arrival (Part 4)
programme.desc: Surrounded by fields, near a vast forest and a pretty stream, lies the village of Bellefontaine. It's home to the fun-loving gang of friends Raphael, Lina, P'tit Pied and Grande Perche. Bubbling over with imagination, they fill every day with exciting adventures.

programme.title: Meurtres A Amiens
programme.desc: On a canal amidst the ''hortillonnages'', the floating market gardens of Amiens, a lifeless body is found in a Nautilus-shaped fun-fair gondola. Inspector Monet and his assistant Barnier head the investigation. The victim, a seemingly ordinary woman, was apparently threatened ambitious plans for a Jules Verne theme park.

The program consists of three segments: 'Viewing the World with Shih', 'Discussing the Past and Present' and 'Speaking New Words'. The senior commentator Shih Chi Ping analyzes the world's political and economic topics from a unique point of view, and deeply analyzes the global trends to audience.

programme.title: E216
programme.desc: MY HONG KONG STORY: Special column of character record. Through the exquisite length of about 15 minutes in each episode, it tells the stories of Hong Kong people and what happened. For the national Chinese audience, understand the new perspective of Hong Kong.

programme.title: E16 - Hex Marks The Spot
programme.desc: Rachael is a caretaker whose arm bump interferes with helping her disabled bestie. Medical student Gili assists Dr. Lee with Christian's painful back bump as his stuffed-animal companion watches.

programme.title: Killer Fortune Teller
programme.desc: When Michael, an older single man looking for companionship, falls for alluring psychic Janis, she sees him as an easy mark. But will Janis be exposed by Virginia, Michael's concerned relative?

programme.title: Big Lies In A Small Town
programme.desc: Rachel searches for her daughter after their car crashed outside of a town. She gets closer to finding out that the town doctor kidnapped her. He and his wife never got over the loss of their daughter.

programme.title: E3 - A Country Cake
programme.desc: When Buddy is tasked with making a cake for International Country Superstar Walker Hayes, the team must find a way to transform the lyrics to his hit song 'Fancy Like' into a sweet masterpiece!

programme.title: E7 - Meatloaf Wellington With Sorghum Mustard
programme.desc: Chef Deborah cooks a dish inspired by American meatloaf, blending the recipe with an English-style Wellington. She adds a Southern favourite, sorghum mustard, and prepares smothered potatoes.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: In the early hours, the four-member team races from Seoul to Jeonju. From design and interior renovations to store menu development, everything is in their hands!

programme.title: E8 - Lomo Saltado With Pork And Sweet Potatoes
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece puts a Southern twist on the classic Peruvian dish lomo saltado by using pork and adding sweet potato fries.

programme.title: E6 - Hello, London!
programme.desc: Theresa is a nervous wreck trying to figure out what to pack for her first visit to the UK. Before departing she sages Victoria's house and brings a pre-housewarming gift to encourage her to move out.

programme.title: Biz Talk
programme.desc: A groundbreaking 30-minute interview show, giving an in-depth look into how top companies around the world conduct business and how policymakers view the fast-changing world economy. It presents 360 degree profiles of industry movers and shakers, tech mavericks and policymakers, and drills down on the stories behind their success, to give you clarity on what's happening in every facet of business.

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China's rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country's culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China's rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country's culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.desc: Hawking considers one of the most important mysteries facing humankind, the possibility of aliens. He leads us on a journey rendered in eye-popping detail.

programme.desc: Arun, from India, has four legs, with the second pair growing from his back. We film him travelling to Delhi to seek an operation.

programme.desc: To win the prize privately funded team needs to land a rover on the Moon, navigate it for 500 meters and send 'Mooncasts' back to Earth.

programme.desc: Bingo loves playing with Dad, but sometimes he forgets Bingo is smaller than her sister. Mum teaches Bingo how to use her big girl bark to keep the fun within her limits.

programme.desc: Dwayne Fields continues his journey through Zambia. At Kafue National Park, he joins rangers tracking poachers, takes part in a lion monitoring expedition, and meets orphaned elephants.

E18
programme.desc: Working-class Taara and wealthy heir Yuvraaj defy class for a deep, undeniable love. But with family honour at stake, can Yuvraaj choose her over his legacy?

programme.title: E857
programme.desc: Jhanak, determined to keep her mother's vow, embarks on a life-changing path. Facing hardships and loss, she encounters a man who adds a new layer of complexity to her journey.

programme.desc: Working-class Taara and wealthy heir Yuvraaj defy class for a deep, undeniable love. But with family honour at stake, can Yuvraaj choose her over his legacy?

programme.title: Wheelchairs for Pets
programme.desc: Host Alie Ward presents a family making wheelchairs for disabled pets and meets the inventors of a phone antenna for emergencies and of fire-fighting soundwaves. She has tips on raising funds for inventions.

programme.title: Fashion Designer
programme.desc: Kids meet a sustainable fashion designer.

programme.title: Anysberg - Hidden Gem Of The Klein Karoo
programme.desc: The team visits Anysberg, an island mountain in the Karoo Desert. They find a cave with mysterious rock art that provides a glimpse into the past, and they discover how Nature can recover when given a chance.

programme.title: Tournaments
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, tournaments are all the rage! When Howler's behavior is interpreted of that as a crazed fan, he unwittingly finds himself in the shoes of a knight, embarking on a wild joust!

programme.title: Green Science and Recycling
programme.desc: What's the difference between science and green science? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of renewable energy. Have hands-on fun by making your lettuce sustainable, and get to know Ryoji Noyori, a chemist and great advocate of green chemistry.

programme.title: Big Dress Up
programme.desc: Ranger Loops gives the kids a box of old costumes, and while they're dressing up, Vik learns that his true self is what's most important.

programme.title: Marble Maze
programme.desc: How do you make a marble-ous maze? We'll show you step by step, so you don't get lost.

programme.title: Cloudy Day
programme.desc: Chaos erupts in the park when Yoko turns clouds into real animals, and the kids must plan how to return things to normal!

programme.title: Bum Power
programme.desc: The doctors make Billy Bones his very own bum and reveal the power of your gluteus maximus muscle! Meanwhile, Felix comes into the emergency department with a cut eye, and Asia has an injured foot.

programme.title: Fossil Finds
programme.desc: Eric learns that fossils are like fingerprints left behind by prehistoric plants or animals. He makes some modern-day fossils using toy dinosaurs and flour.

programme.title: The Golden Girl (Kelly Holmes) and The Spaceman (Tim Peake)
programme.desc: In this episode of Bear Grylls' Becoming Xtraordinary, Kelly Holmes reflects on how she became a double Olympic gold medallist and Tim Peake shares his journey from test pilot to the UK's first European Space Agency astronaut to stay on the International Space Station.

programme.title: Quest for Roman Numerals
programme.desc: C, D, I, V, and X are Roman numerals that still appear in the names of monarchs, the production year of films, and on buildings. In this episode we learn all there is about them. Can we still use Roman numerals to communicate?

programme.title: Who's Getting Snotted?
programme.desc: There's a snot-tastic dose of Ouchology as the doctors face tough medical questions, and a VIP guest is due in the lab to help explain why DNA is a funny, twisty shape. Meanwhile, in the Emergency Department, Jan has cut his eyebrow, and Lennox has hurt his knee.

programme.title: Admirable Admiral
programme.desc: Eric learns that even if something is made from a material that is denser or heavier than water, it will float if it has the right shape. He makes a paper boat strong enough to carry toy cars without sinking.

programme.title: Orca Baby
programme.desc: Morgan, the deaf orca, is about to give birth to her very first calf. The stakes are high, and the staff at Loro Parque are holding their collective breath as the scene is set for the greatest natural phenomenon in the zoo's history.

programme.title: Friction and Reality
programme.desc: Eric learns about friction by rolling a ball over different surfaces and rubbing his hands together to warm them up. He discovers there is no friction in space.

programme.title: Anysberg - Hidden Gem Of The Klein Karoo
programme.desc: The team visits Anysberg, an island mountain in the Karoo Desert. They find a cave with mysterious rock art that provides a glimpse into the past, and they discover how Nature can recover when given a chance.

programme.title: Cloudy Day
programme.desc: Chaos erupts in the park when Yoko turns clouds into real animals, and the kids must plan how to return things to normal!

programme.title: The Golden Girl (Kelly Holmes) and The Spaceman (Tim Peake)
programme.desc: In this episode of Bear Grylls' Becoming Xtraordinary, Kelly Holmes reflects on how she became a double Olympic gold medallist and Tim Peake shares his journey from test pilot to the UK's first European Space Agency astronaut to stay on the International Space Station.

programme.title: Tin Can
programme.desc: Tin Tin Tin, Hepi and Briko have an unbelievable idea for these tin cans.

programme.title: Plastic Spoon
programme.desc: Hepi and Briko reuse spoons to make some cute DIY's.

programme.title: Day of the Dragon
programme.desc: Ricky orders a takeaway, but will his fortune cookies' predictions come true? After making a dragon bike basket and using a pizza box as a canvas, Gavin arrives with a map to the Great Wall of Bristol to animate a monster of a picture.

programme.title: Mystery at Cinderella Castle
programme.desc: Rose enjoys her fairy tale life but dislikes returning to Earth. When Vicky's plan backfires and the Gate to Earth closes, Granny Cinderella invites Rose, Joy, and Astoria for a sleepover at her castle. They must solve the mystery of Granny's stolen shoes before dawn.

programme.title: Search for the Big Seven Part 1: The Garden of Eden
programme.desc: When a group of young explorers set off for an adventure in the vast Addo Elephant National Park in South Africa, they get more than they bargained for. They meet buffalo, snakes and a giant lizard big enough to kill a rabbit.

programme.title: Reuse to Make Instruments
programme.desc: The Grimwades decide to reuse the carton to make a drum for Reu. After lunch, Mummy takes the family to a hall where a steel drum band is rehearsing. One of the drummers helps Reu make his drum and gives an idea for the Grimwades to make use of the pots and pans.

programme.title: Marble Maze
programme.desc: How do you make a marble-ous maze? We'll show you step by step, so you don't get lost.

programme.title: Inventicon
programme.desc: The big invention convention is finally here! The team's nemesis Shirley debuts her now fully-functional Potato Phone. Kaylyn and Alicia become fascinated by a dreamy inventor with a much-too-simple invention.

programme.title: Oops, I Forted!
programme.desc: Do you want to know how you can build a really big fort? In this episode Eric reveals an exciting trick. The ingredients? A lot of cushions and the mathematical 'perimeter'. So gather your pillows and get ready for some fort action!

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 多海是魔論製菓公司疲憊不堪的營銷團隊經理，她不知道自己還能忍受這種看似毫無希望的生活多久。就在這時，一心追求經濟利益的銷售部恩尚向她提出了投資加密貨幣的大膽建議。在經歷了無數次失敗後，加密貨幣成了恩尚最後的救命稻草，也是她扭轉人生的一線希望。會計部智松把花錢等同於幸福，出於害怕被拋在後面，她衝動地加入了他們。這場賭博很快變成了加密貨幣市場跌宕起伏的過山車之旅。當放棄歌唱事業、冉冉升起的公司董事咸志宇加入他們時，不可預測的混亂局面只會加深。這三個普通工人能否中大獎，一路飛向月球？

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 在華麗成功的三位朋友面前，出現一位 10 年前因她們的謊言而成為殺人犯的老朋友，她為揭開三人隱藏在假面之下的真面目而決定背水一戰。而四位老朋友也因一位男人面臨人生漩渦，彼此展開關乎嫉妒和慾望戰爭的故事。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.desc: 多海是魔論製菓公司疲憊不堪的營銷團隊經理，她不知道自己還能忍受這種看似毫無希望的生活多久。就在這時，一心追求經濟利益的銷售部恩尚向她提出了投資加密貨幣的大膽建議。在經歷了無數次失敗後，加密貨幣成了恩尚最後的救命稻草，也是她扭轉人生的一線希望。會計部智松把花錢等同於幸福，出於害怕被拋在後面，她衝動地加入了他們。這場賭博很快變成了加密貨幣市場跌宕起伏的過山車之旅。當放棄歌唱事業、冉冉升起的公司董事咸志宇加入他們時，不可預測的混亂局面只會加深。這三個普通工人能否中大獎，一路飛向月球？

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 女急救醫生杏野朱羅(松本若菜)有著出色的醫療技術，甚至能夠同時為兩名重症患者進行高難度手術，以致被稱為「阿修羅醫生」，她從不考慮醫院的利益，亦不會顧忌上級，只會專注拯救眼前的患者，即使對方身無分文又或者是黑道成員，都堅信要絕對幫助他們！

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 文太（大泉洋）是一名被公司解雇的落魄上班族。在和妻子離婚後，因財產分割與賠償金而耗盡積蓄，只能過著寄宿在網咖的生活。就在某一天，文太奇蹟地通過了一家公司的最終面試。在文太前往公司提前準備好的住宅時，一位陌生女子突然出現在家中並對他說「歡迎回來」。這似乎是必須以「夫妻」的身分和這個「陌生的妻子」一起生活。文太瞬間成為有「一點點超能力」的英雄，被賦予的任務是——「拯救世界」。然而，還附帶了一條不合理又難以理解的規則：「不可以真心地去愛任何人」。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: Jeena Sirf Merre Liye
programme.desc: Childhood friends Pooja and Karan separate when she moves cities. Years later, they reunite unknowingly, missing each other while searching for the same lost bond again. Release Year: 2002 Director: Talat Jani

programme.title: Uri - The Surgical Strike
programme.desc: Indian army special forces execute a covert operation, avenging the killing of fellow army men at their base by a terrorist group. Release Year: 2019 Director: Aditya Dhar

programme.title: Gadar 2

programme.title: E2 - Tornadoes
programme.desc: Tornadoes - can we use modern technology to effectively predict the emergence and path of this force of nature?

programme.title: E3 - Always Bet on Dot
programme.desc: Once homeless and a teen-mom, Dot leaves the big city for a much needed adventure alongside Bear Grylls. She's overcome life's biggest challenges but has never tackled the wild. Her emotional journey is a truly inspiring tale of survival.

programme.title: E3 - Bear in Focus
programme.desc: A family of black bears are studied in the forested hills of Oklahoma.

programme.title: E13 - Food
programme.desc: In this food-filled episode, Catfish throws up all over the world. The biking duo try various forms of genitalia including bull testicle, tiger and sea penis, virgin eggs, otherwise known as pee billed eggs, and more. They try duck head in China and worm tequila and mosquito eggs in Mexico. The question becomes, can you keep it down while watching this special episode?

programme.title: E14 - Columbia
programme.desc: Catfish and Rooftop go on a mission with the Colombian military's anti-narcotics division, test bulletproof clothing on themselves and experience the most painful insect sting in the world.

programme.title: E2 - Shark Go Boom
programme.desc: In this iconic scene, Chief Brody hangs on to his sinking boat as a giant shark approaches him with a scuba tank lodged in its mouth. We construct a giant shark on a motorized platform to test if you can hit, and explode, the tank with an M1 Garand rifle while perched in a precarious position.

It’s a fight to the bitter end, but only one will have their second chance to finally be crowned Top Chef.

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: Since the first series began in 2015, “Inside Stories of Kyoto” has portrayed Kyoto's hidden elegance through both drama and documentary. After the second season reached a full-circle finale, the series finally returns in 2026. Set once again at Kurakuya Harunobu, a 240‑year‑old confectionery, the story picks up eight years after Sawafuji Miyako's departure for Paris. Now a new heroine, Mikami Miyako, arrives from France with a daunting mission. Confronted with Kyoto's intricate traditions and its proud, strong‑willed residents, she must find her own way forward.

programme.title: The Tech Download
programme.desc: Hosted by Arjun Kharpal and Steve Kovach, CNBC's “Tech Download” podcast cuts through the noise to unpack the technology stories that matter most. With access to industry leaders and years of experience covering the biggest tech news, Arjun and Steve deliver sharp analysis and compelling narratives on the trends, risks and innovations shaping tech.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: “American Greed” goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich.

programme.title: Cic Tour De La Provence
programme.desc: Over three days of racing, teams compete on demanding courses, traversing iconic areas of the region: urban centers, hilly roads, and the Provencal landscape. Over the years, the race has established itself as a key event at the start of the season, and an important step in preparing for the major events to come.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Leaders Playbook
programme.desc: Through candid, in-depth interviews with America's top CEOs, CNBC's Senior Media & Tech Correspondent Julia Boorstin explores the leadership philosophies, strategic decisions and personal decisions that have shaped today's most influential companies.

programme.title: The Tech Download
programme.desc: Hosted by Arjun Kharpal and Steve Kovach, CNBC's “Tech Download” podcast cuts through the noise to unpack the technology stories that matter most. With access to industry leaders and years of experience covering the biggest tech news, Arjun and Steve deliver sharp analysis and compelling narratives on the trends, risks and innovations shaping tech.

programme.title: Masters Of Cantonese Cuisine
programme.desc: Masters of Cantonese Cuisine is a documentary on Lingnan (Guangdong) delicacies culture, originally created by Shenzhen Satellite TV. This is a brief history of food belonging to the Greater Bay Area, a history of customs and culture that belongs exclusively to Guangdong. The program focus on the local Guangdong delicacies, and led by a “delicacy searcher”, walking through streets in search of local specialities, visiting masters of Cantonese cuisines, and sharing unique tasting commentaries. In the meantime, the reflection on delicacies would be brought back to live studio, and two observers who are proficient in Cantonese cuisine cultures will have chats on tasting. From a spoon and a drop, it will extend to the taste of life and origin of culture embedded in the delicacies.

E3 - The Waterways
programme.desc: Some of mightiest rivers in North America originate on the glacial heights of the Rocky Mountains. The lakes, rivers and marshes of the Rockies are like arteries pulsing through the landscape, feeding the creatures that call the mountains home. Fed by glaciers and motivated by gravity, these waterways are split by the massive Rockies, which divert flow into the Atlantic, Pacific, and Arctic Oceans. From the uninhabitable icy pecks, water melts off glaciers, runs down thunderous waterfalls, filters through wetlands, sculpts the terrain, and finally flows out to the ocean, sustaining life and transforming environments along the way.

programme.title: E4 - Balancing the Forest
programme.desc: Survival in the forest means maintaining a delicate balance between growth and destruction and death and rebirth - a forest should be in a constant state of regeneration. When trees get too tall they block all the sunlight from hitting the ground, which means grasses and smaller shrubs can’t grow, diminishing habitat for animals like elk, moose, caribou, and wolves.

programme.title: E5 - Group Survival
programme.desc: For a great many species, the structures of group living are the most important for survival. Although social living is integral to many of the animals that call the Rocky Mountains home, no two species organize their society in the same way. Even among closely related species there can be drastic differences in social structure; communication, hierarchy, mating, and diet are all inextricably informed by specific environmental and genetic adaptations for group survival.

programme.title: E5 - Rana: Queen of the Jungle
programme.desc: One of the most iconic animals on Earth stalks the jungles of India: the Bengal Tiger. Over the course of a single day, we follow the fortunes of one mother and her three young cubs. She must provide enough food for her family to stay alive.

programme.title: E7 - Rajan Monkey on a Mission
programme.desc: Rajan is the powerful alpha male who sits at the head of an unusually large troop. He has done well to sustain such a big group, but the future doesn’t look so bright. There are more mouths to feed, and yet his jungle home is shrinking.

programme.title: E8 - Temple Monkeys on the Run
programme.desc: Nestled on the edge of the ancient city of Jodhpur, the luxurious Temple Gardens are home to a huge troop of Hanuman Langurs, who enjoy a peaceful life of bounty. But the troop has a strict hierarchy.

programme.title: E9 - Nagaina: Queen of Kings
programme.desc: In the hot forest of Southern India, a female King Cobra is on a mission: to find a mate, find food, and lay eggs before the monsoon arrives.

programme.title: E1 - Mission Black Rhino
programme.desc: It’s a critical time for two black rhinos in Zambia. Four year old female Apson and fourteen year old bull Kango are at the core of a complex relocation mission that’s part of a grand plan to save a species.

programme.title: E2 - Carnivore Rescue
programme.desc: Deep in Kafue National Park, the largest and wildest protected area in Zambia, a team of biologists and vets from the Zambian Carnivore Programme (ZCP) races against time to save and protect Africa’s apex predators.

programme.title: E3 - A Life Among Trees
programme.desc: How many trees can you find in the Amazon? And what’s it like to live up in them? Travel through the canopy and see how more than 1200 species of trees coexist. Plus, follow monkeys and other creatures who call these trees home.

programme.title: E4 - Dry Season
programme.desc: The dry season is the toughest time of year. With lower water levels and less space, animals need to quickly learn new skills to survive…and if they don’t, predatory vultures will swoop in for a feast.

programme.title: E1 - Mission Black Rhino
programme.desc: It’s a critical time for two black rhinos in Zambia. Four year old female Apson and fourteen year old bull Kango are at the core of a complex relocation mission that’s part of a grand plan to save a species.

programme.title: E2 - Carnivore Rescue
programme.desc: Deep in Kafue National Park, the largest and wildest protected area in Zambia, a team of biologists and vets from the Zambian Carnivore Programme (ZCP) races against time to save and protect Africa’s apex predators.

programme.title: E3 - A Life Among Trees
programme.desc: How many trees can you find in the Amazon? And what’s it like to live up in them? Travel through the canopy and see how more than 1200 species of trees coexist. Plus, follow monkeys and other creatures who call these trees home.

programme.title: E4 - Dry Season
programme.desc: The dry season is the toughest time of year. With lower water levels and less space, animals need to quickly learn new skills to survive…and if they don’t, predatory vultures will swoop in for a feast.

programme.title: E2 - Namib: Land Of Extremes
programme.desc: The Namib Desert is a land of extremes, from icy ocean to baking sand. It takes toughness and adaptation to live in this desert, and only a special few can. From the sidewinding adder to the fog-collecting beetle, each animal has their tricks for survival in the Namib.

programme.title: E3 - The Last Desert Giants
programme.desc: The Namib is the oldest desert in the world, hugging Africa’s shoreline for over 400 kilometers. It is one of the most inhospitable habitats on earth. Yet the world’s largest land mammal has made a home here, adapted through behavior and designed to life in the extreme.

programme.title: Turtle Beach
programme.desc: Locals call it the ‘arribada’, or ‘arrival’. The magical days and nights when tens of thousands of sea turtles come ashore in Costa Rica, to lay millions of eggs.

programme.title: E3 - Choices
programme.desc: Learn how Ningaloo’s conservation miracle could inspire humans to pull the planet back from the brink of climatic destruction. Visit an abandoned whaling station and other ruins that show we have the tools, if only we can find the will to change.

programme.title: E3 - The Next Generation
programme.desc: Channel your inner sci-fi fan and explore the bizarre mating rituals of the ocean’s most peculiar creatures. Learn how bloody battles for mates, gender bending and supersize litters of babies just might secure a next generation for these animals.

programme.title: E1 - A Land Of Great Thirst
programme.desc: In Alone's driest location yet, ten new participants must survive in the Great Karoo desert as they face extreme temperatures, new species of predators, and a host of exhausting challenges.

programme.title: E601 - Big Apple Rick
programme.desc: Rick's in the big apple to see if he can compute a deal on a rare piece of tech. Will this enticing piece lure Rick in? A seller brings a special edition Stan Lee Funko Pop. Will Corey make a super deal?

programme.title: E237 - The Top Ten Mysteries Of The Deep
programme.desc: Ancient Aliens is counting down the top ten mysteries of the deep, from sunken continents to puzzling ruins on the ocean floor and even artefacts that might be remnants of Atlantis.

programme.title: E3 - Whistle While You Work
programme.desc: The team is thrilled yet concerned when the investigation of the Golden Egg, an area that scientific evidence suggests the legendary riches are hidden in, immediately shows signs that it may be collapsing.

programme.title: E417 - Diamonds Are For Heather

programme.title: E206 - The Rejects
programme.desc: When Leo, Mikey, and Raph are captured by the mad scientist Jordan Perry and his Monster Mutanimals, Donnie must stop a mutant invasion on Staten Island and save everyone from the terrifying creation known as Mutant Omega!

programme.title: E113 - Journey to the Otter Side
programme.desc: The family's excited to take Jack to Lake World, Lily's favorite theme park. But when a lackluster day ends with realizing Lily's favorite ride has vanished, the kids must survive a thrilling adventure to find it and save their vacation.

programme.title: E214 - Out of the Picture / Room with a Feud
programme.desc: Afraid they'll be forgotten, Lincoln and Clyde want to make a splash in the yearbook and crash group photos. // Seeing his sisters fight with their roommates, Lincoln suggests a room shuffle based on a compatibility test.

programme.title: E108 - For Your Spies Only
programme.desc: Max and Phoebe attend Parent-Teacher Night, leaving Chloe and friends home without adult supervision. When Jinx finds the Air Lair, he believes spies are targeting the school, and his meddling puts the Thundermans' school jobs at risk.

programme.title: E216 - iMake Sam Girlier
programme.desc: When Sam admits she has a crush on a boy at school, Carly teaches Sam how to entice him by acting more girly. Meanwhile, Spencer is convinced that a girl likes him because of his tuxedo, so he starts wearing it all the time.

programme.title: E123 - That Sinkhole Feeling / Like a Brother
programme.desc: Best and Bester get too carried away when tasked with commercializing Bettervale's most beguiling natural wonder. // Diamondo is used to getting everything he wants, and decides what he wants is a sibling, just like Best and Bester.

programme.desc: Patrick learns what GrandPat's childhood was like. // Cave Pat hosts a show with his cave family.

programme.desc: Peppa and George visit Granny Pig and Grandpa Pig's house for lunch. Granny Pig has made a salad but George doesn't like vegetables, so Grandpa Pig makes the salad into a dinosaur shape to help George eat his salad.

programme.title: E116 - Return Of The Nightwalker
programme.desc: Sharkdog and Mia team up in an unlikely pairing to stop Max from sleepwalking right into the ocean!

programme.title: E216 - Going With The Flow / The Decoder

programme.title: Why Valencia Should Be Your Next Spanish Escape
programme.desc: Join us in Valencia, Spain! DW's Sarah Hucal takes you through her favorite city. She dives into historic plazas, vibrant street art, lively markets and the stunning City of Arts and Sciences. Discover why this might be Spain's most underrated big city - and taste local favorites from creamy horchata to iconic paella.

programme.title: Street Debate: Did Kaluma Boy Expose Kenya's Broken And Corrupt System?
programme.desc: In Kenya, corruption scandals and a failing health system leave families stranded. When hospitals and governments vanish, citizens turn to TikTok and civil society for help to build roads, equip schools or anything else. The story of Kaluma Boy caring for his sick father exposes a dysfunctional state and the power of online solidarity.

programme.title: Why Valencia Should Be Your Next Spanish Escape

programme.title: This Is My Body
programme.desc: Jerome was sexually abused as a child. When he files a complaint against the former priest, he also picks up a camera. He then films the six years leading up to the trial.

programme.title: When Night Falls In Vienna
programme.desc: Vienna is beautiful. Surrounded by elegant imperial facades, people enjoy culture and coffee. Or, they might clatter past St. Stephen's Cathedral and the Sisi Museum in horse-drawn carriages. But when night falls, the city shows itself in a whole new light.

programme.title: Street Debate: Did Kaluma Boy Expose Kenya's Broken And Corrupt System?
programme.desc: In Kenya, corruption scandals and a failing health system leave families stranded. When hospitals and governments vanish, citizens turn to TikTok and civil society for help to build roads, equip schools or anything else. The story of Kaluma Boy caring for his sick father exposes a dysfunctional state and the power of online solidarity.

programme.title: Nietzsche Explained: Why A 19Th Century Rebel Feels So Gen Z
programme.desc: Nietzsche Explained: from 'God is dead” to the Ubermensch, hype culture and Kanye West. More than 125 years after his death, Friedrich Nietzsche has become a surprising icon for Gen Z and Gen Alpha. His sharp critiques of morality, religion, and society feel uncannily modern in an age of social media, burnout, and constant self-optimization.

programme.title: Street Debate: Did Kaluma Boy Expose Kenya's Broken And Corrupt System?
programme.desc: In Kenya, corruption scandals and a failing health system leave families stranded. When hospitals and governments vanish, citizens turn to TikTok and civil society for help to build roads, equip schools or anything else. The story of Kaluma Boy caring for his sick father exposes a dysfunctional state and the power of online solidarity.

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E261 -THE SHADOW'S EDGE
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: Suzume
programme.desc: Suzume, a 17-year-old girl who lives in a quiet town in Kyushu, meets Souta, a young man looking for a door. Following Souta, Suzume finds an old door in the mountains and reaches out her hands towards the door as if pulled by something. This opened door will bring disaster; thus, Souta must travel around to lock the door to avoid disaster. But then, a mysterious kitten turns Souta into a broken wooden chair. To catch the kitten, Suzume and Souta follow it and travel from Kyushu to Tokyo. “Doors of disaster” begin to appear across Japan simultaneously, and Suzume needs to close and lock the doors one by one to stop the disasters. Unexpectedly, a forgotten truth is waiting for her.

programme.title: Napping Kid
programme.desc: Siu-yu, a financial analyst who has been working to complete a budget analyst for an investment bank, finds that a file containing confidential information has been mysteriously deleted. Soon after, her boss, John, receives a ransom email from someone called K Kidnapper, demanding just $190,000 worth of ransom. The ransom must be paid in 3 days, otherwise they will share the information to public. Under a detective's secret investigation, everyone could be the suspect...

programme.title: CYBERHEIST
programme.desc: A menacing forest of fiber and data lies behind every digital screen. The Internet, while having given birth to many innovations, is also the nest of deadly computer viruses.Around the world, on a daily basis malicious hackers attack firewalls holding Governments, private companies and citizens hostage. However, not even the strongest of the hackers can do in Chun, a genius cyber security engineer who can fend off any attack with his innovative, self-developed protective firewall system. In an attempt to bring him down, unfortunately Chun gets caught up in a money laundering operation where he discovers that his boss Chi is behind the attack. To fight Chi and regain his integrity and credibility, Chun has to venture into the dark web where he can deploy an all-powerful AI virus that he created; along the way taking down violent hit-men and hackers in order to uncover the evidence of Chi's crimes. In the meantime, Chi attempts to seize Chun's technology, further resorting to

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E266 -Night King
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: Over My Dead Body
programme.desc: A dead body and a hotchpotch of homeowners in a residential building on a single night: all hell breaks loose. As the Jewish axiom has it, “man thinks; God laughs.” On a night like any other, Ming, together with his wife and mother-in-law, finds an anonymous naked dead body lying at their doorstep. They might not know who the body was, but they have no doubt that their unit will become a “murder home” once this is exposed. Its property value will nosedive, and they will be transformed from blissful homeowners to miserable victims. So they decide to pass the buck to their neighbours. There are eleven living residents in four units on the same floor. Besides Ming's family of five, there are the retired elderly couple, Mr. & Mrs. Chan; the single lady Mary and her maid; and the Cheung's, an irascible father and his cantankerous son. Last but not least, there is this mysterious woman from an upper floor who chain smokes. This motley group of residents start fighting against one a

programme.desc: Novelist Ngan is leading a comfortable life living on the royalties. He has now placed all his attention onto his daughter Sophia, who has reached a suitable age for marriage...

E7 - Siblings Month: Cooking & Fun!
programme.desc: Join the siblings for cooking & fun! First, the kids plan a surprise romantic dinner date for Mom & Dad! Then, they try putting ketchup on everything to see if it's yummy or yucky! The fun continues as they make a crazy bubble machine that gets a little out of control. From putting on a sock puppet show to navigating a life-size corn maze, it's a month of creative fun & sibling teamwork!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Special Day with Jill!
programme.desc: Join Jill for a super special day of friendship & discovery! First, she's at the playground with her friends when she notices a new girl is there all alone. Jill takes it upon herself to make friends with the girl & make her feel welcome. Then, while all of her friends know what their 'thing' is, Jill is unsure. She tries playing sports & dancing, but none of them stick. Eventually, she discovers that she's really good at arts & crafts & makes friendship bracelets for everyone!

programme.title: E1 - Our Favorite Family Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Buster on his favorite family adventures! When Mummy has to dash off to work, Buster & Grandpa have to make dinner together. They follow a recipe & it creates a big mess, but it's still tasty! The adventures continue as Buster & Daddy spend the day together, playing soccer & chasing a runaway kite! Plus, the whole family goes on an outdoor camping trip where a runaway tent causes chaos through the campsite.

programme.title: E4 - Baby John's Family Are His Heroes!
programme.desc: Baby John thinks his family members are the best heroes! He really loves & admires his dad, & wants to copy everything he does to be just like him. His big brother Jack is a hero, too, & is always willing to help his little brother & teach him new things. After Mom's cupcakes go missing, Baby John dresses up as a police officer to find out who took them, interviewing each of his family member heroes!

E31
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。
